title: Who killed Kaji
wikitext:
[]: Who killed Kaji? Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Jul 14, 2004 11:46 am i always wondering who did kill Kaji?i believe its Misato who did this but i am not sure.what do you think?

[]: Post by DatDude » Wed Jul 14, 2004 11:59 am I do not thinkit was her, just one of his random connections that killed him off when he becak to troublesome by learning to much.

[]: Post by Phaze » Wed Jul 14, 2004 1:29 pm Misato has no reason to kill Kaji, and Anno has officially stated that it was "A third party either working for SEELE or NERV's intelligence division."

[]: Post by Nephilim » Wed Jul 14, 2004 3:06 pm Yeah, anno has stated that. But people get confused for the line thet Kaji says: "Hi! You're late" It seems that he's talking to someone familiar, but he said that just because he already knew his fate, and he took it with a sarcastic touch.

[]: Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Jul 14, 2004 4:01 pm yeah this line "hi you're late" is really confusing.the first time i saw this episode i told myself "why did Misato kill Kaji?i mean she loves him"but you're right Kaji is really a special person and keeps his humour even in the moment of his death.

[]: Post by EVA-01X » Wed Jul 14, 2004 5:15 pm I still think it was Pen-Pen <_< >_> What? Actullly If your going to put a face to his killer I think it was his contact, that lady with the dog in the "Magma Diver" episode and she later appeared when Kaji was investigating the Marduk Agency as well. That would explain they're closeness and stuff.

[]: Post by Crazyman42 » Wed Jul 14, 2004 7:28 pm Misato didn't kill Kaji? Wow, I always thought she did. I guess it must have been a third party worker.

[]: Post by TheMessiah » Wed Jul 14, 2004 7:53 pm in my eyes theres nothing that points towards Misato killing Kaji, never have been, never will be short of the words of Anno himself

[]: Post by sadsadshinji » Thu Jul 15, 2004 1:45 pm always thought it was someone from seele...Kaji knew about gendo's plans yet didnt do anything...in fact..he furthered them...(bringing adam) seele probably got angry and decided him to be useless...

[]: Post by aranami » Fri Jul 16, 2004 10:28 am In the Manga version Misato is still in containment when Kaji is killed

[]: Post by Abaddon » Fri Jul 16, 2004 11:37 am Personal, I believe it was someone from Seele that drove home the fatal shots. According to Anno, it was a third parity figure who killed him. Maybe 2015 holds some clues.

[]: Post by Crazyman42 » Fri Jul 16, 2004 7:27 pm I always thought it was Misato. It just seemed logical, I mean look at her, she kinda hates him and loves him at the same time, it would seem logical. Though, now that I think about it, it probably was a third party member.

[]: Post by max3000 » Fri Jul 16, 2004 8:04 pm It was I!!! And i think Gendo killed him ...too.

[]: Post by EVA-01X » Fri Jul 16, 2004 8:11 pm Abaddon wrote: Personal, I believe it was someone from Seele that drove home the fatal shots. According to Anno, it was a third parity figure who killed him. Maybe 2015 holds some clues.

[]: Post by secondson » Fri Jul 16, 2004 8:28 pm Please. We all know it was Tinkie-Winkie from Teletubbies. C'mon, it's so obvious. Honestly, I don't know who killed Kaji. I just remember being very upset that he was killed, and didn't put too much thought into it past that - just one more favourite anime character down :? I side with the third party theory.

[]: Post by Esion » Fri Jul 16, 2004 8:39 pm Perhaps he has a personality disorder and he killed himself.

[]: Post by Abaddon » Sat Jul 17, 2004 1:04 am EVA-01X wrote: Abaddon wrote: Personal, I believe it was someone from Seele that drove home the fatal shots. According to Anno, it was a third parity figure who killed him. Maybe 2015 holds some clues.

[]: Post by Somnius Kenate » Sat Jul 17, 2004 1:32 am Anno specifically stated it was a third-party person working for NERV's Intelligence Agency. Misato is not even a part of that divison. I think it is safe to say it was not her.

[]: Post by Hexon.Arq » Sat Jul 17, 2004 2:55 pm Actually, the sound you heard was not a gunshot. What happened was that a friend showed up with a motorcycle, and he and Kaji hopped on and rode to the airport to leave for Vegas. The sound was a backfire.

[]: Post by coff » Sun Jul 18, 2004 1:00 am Of course! It's so clear now!
